entity.summary: Singapore-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in May 2018. BITKER reported a cyberattack on May 28, 2019 that caused losses it could not absorb and terminated exchange operations on September 2, 2019.
entity.notes: The former exchange domain now presents unrelated or substantially repurposed Web3-oriented material and is not treated as an active continuation of the 2018-2019 exchange. The shutdown date and causal connection to the May 2019 attack are supported by a preserved transcription of the exchange announcement and independent reporting.

events.title: BITKER launched in Singapore
events.description: BITKER began operating in May 2018 as a Singapore-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange.
events.notes: Month-level launch marker from independent exchange directories.

events.title: BITKER suffered a cyberattack
events.description: BITKER stated that it suffered a cyberattack on May 28, 2019 and incurred losses that the business could not afford.
events.notes: The recovered source preserves the text of the exchange's closure announcement.

events.title: BITKER terminated exchange operations
events.description: BITKER ended exchange operations at 23:59:59 on September 2, 2019 after concluding that it could not recover from the losses caused by the May cyberattack.
events.notes: The exact terminal date is stated in the preserved company announcement and corroborated by exchange-tracking records.

evidence.title: BITKER exchange review
evidence.notes: Exchange directory records a May 2018 launch and Singapore operating origin.

evidence.title: BITKER exchange profile
evidence.notes: Profile corroborates the Singapore identity and May 2018 exchange launch period.

evidence.title: BITKER Exchange announces closure after revealing cyber attack
evidence.notes: The report preserves the exchange announcement stating that the May 28 cyberattack caused unaffordable losses and led to closure.

evidence.title: BITKER exchange closure profile
evidence.notes: Exchange profile records termination of operations on September 2, 2019.

evidence.title: BITKER exchange announced that it would cease operations
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous reporting corroborates the attack-related closure announcement and September 2 terminal date.
